---
title: "2. loading data"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc-depth: 6
editor: visual
author: "Weronika Oprzędek"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Loading data into R studio

#### locusta

```{r}
## Prepare Locusta count matrix

### Import featureCounts output

counts <- read.table(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta_counts.txt",
  row.names = 1,
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE
)

### Format count matrix

# Remove feature annotation columns
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)]

# Simplify sample names
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))
colnames(counts) <- gsub("locusta_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))

head(counts)
dim(counts)

### Import sample metadata

metadata <- read.csv(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta_metadata.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  header = TRUE,
  sep = ";"
)

head(metadata)
dim(metadata)

### Match metadata to count matrix

# Reorder metadata to match the count matrix
locusta_metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop = FALSE]

# Verify that sample order is identical
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(locusta_metadata))

# Add species information
locusta_metadata$Species <- "locusta"

### Filter genes

# Remove genes with zero counts across all samples
locusta_counts<-counts[rowSums(counts)!=0,]
dim(locusta_counts)


### Save processed data
saveRDS(
  locusta_counts,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/locusta_counts.rds"
)
saveRDS(
  locusta_metadata,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/locusta_metadata.rds"
)
```

#### harmonia

```{r}
## Prepare Harmonia count matrix

### Import featureCounts output

counts <- read.table(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/harmonia_counts.txt",
  row.names = 1,
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE
)

### Format count matrix

# Remove feature annotation columns
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)]

# Simplify sample names
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))
colnames(counts) <- gsub("harmonia_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))

head(counts)
dim(counts)

### Import sample metadata

metadata <- read.csv(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/harmonia_metadata.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  header = TRUE,
  sep = ";"
)

head(metadata)
dim(metadata)

### Match metadata to count matrix

# Reorder metadata to match the count matrix
harmonia_metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop = FALSE]

# Verify that sample order is identical
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(harmonia_metadata))

# Add species information
harmonia_metadata$Species <- "harmonia"

### Filter genes

# Remove genes with zero counts across all samples
harmonia_counts <- counts[rowSums(counts) != 0, ]

dim(harmonia_counts)

### Save processed data

saveRDS(
  harmonia_counts,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/harmonia_counts.rds"
)

saveRDS(
  harmonia_metadata,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/harmonia_metadata.rds"
)
```

#### plutella

```{r}
## Prepare Plutella count matrix

### Import featureCounts output

counts <- read.table(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plutella_counts.txt",
  row.names = 1,
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE
)

### Format count matrix

# Remove feature annotation columns
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)]

# Simplify sample names
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))
colnames(counts) <- gsub("plutella_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))

head(counts)
dim(counts)

### Import sample metadata

metadata <- read.csv(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plutella_metadata.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  header = TRUE,
  sep = ";"
)

head(metadata)
dim(metadata)

### Match metadata to count matrix

# Reorder metadata to match the count matrix
plutella_metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop = FALSE]

# Verify that sample order is identical
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(plutella_metadata))

# Add species information
plutella_metadata$Species <- "plutella"

### Filter genes

# Remove genes with zero counts across all samples
plutella_counts <- counts[rowSums(counts) != 0, ] 

dim(plutella_counts)

### Save processed data

saveRDS(
  plutella_counts,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/plutella_counts.rds"
)

saveRDS(
  plutella_metadata,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/plutella_metadata.rds"
)
```

#### drosophila (set I)

```{r}

## Prepare Drosophila count matrix

### Import featureCounts output

counts <- read.table(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/drosophila_counts.txt",
  row.names = 1,
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE
)

### Format count matrix

# Remove feature annotation columns
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)]

# Simplify sample names
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))
colnames(counts) <- gsub("drosophila_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))

head(counts)
dim(counts)

### Import sample metadata

metadata <- read.csv(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/drosophila_metadata.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  header = TRUE,
  sep = ";"
)

head(metadata)
dim(metadata)

### Match metadata to count matrix

# Reorder metadata to match the count matrix
drosophila_metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop = FALSE]

# Verify that sample order is identical
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(drosophila_metadata))

# Add species information
drosophila_metadata$Species <- "drosophila"

### Filter genes

# Remove genes with zero counts across all samples
drosophila_counts <- counts[rowSums(counts) != 0, ]

dim(drosophila_counts)

### Save processed data

saveRDS(
  drosophila_counts,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/drosophila_counts.rds"
)

saveRDS(
  drosophila_metadata,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/drosophila_metadata.rds"
)
```

#### blattella

```{r}
## Prepare Blattella count matrix

### Import featureCounts output

counts <- read.table(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/blattella_counts.txt",
  row.names = 1,
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE
)

### Format count matrix

# Remove feature annotation columns
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)]

# Simplify sample names
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))
colnames(counts) <- gsub("blattella_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))

head(counts)
dim(counts)

### Import sample metadata

blattella_metadata <- read.csv(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/blattella_metadata.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  header = TRUE,
  sep = ";"
)

head(blattella_metadata)
dim(blattella_metadata)

### Match metadata to count matrix

# Reorder metadata to match the count matrix
blattella_metadata <- blattella_metadata[colnames(counts), , drop = FALSE]

# Verify that sample order is identical
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(blattella_metadata))

# Add species information
blattella_metadata$Species <- "blattella"

### Filter genes

# Remove genes with zero counts across all samples
blattella_counts <- counts[rowSums(counts) != 0, ]

dim(blattella_counts)

### Save processed data

saveRDS(
  blattella_counts,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/blattella_counts.rds"
)

saveRDS(
  blattella_metadata,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/blattella_metadata.rds"
)
```

#### drosophila (set II)

```{r}
## Prepare second Drosophila count matrix

### Import featureCounts output

counts <- read.table(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/2drosophila_counts.txt",
  row.names = 1,
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE
)

### Format count matrix

# Remove feature annotation columns
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)]

# Simplify sample names
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))
colnames(counts) <- gsub("X2drosophila_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))

head(counts)
dim(counts)

### Import sample metadata

metadata <- read.csv(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/2drosophila_metadata.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  header = TRUE,
  sep = ";"
)

head(metadata)
dim(metadata)

### Match metadata to count matrix

# Reorder metadata to match the count matrix
drosophila2_metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop = FALSE]

# Verify that sample order is identical
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(drosophila2_metadata))

# Add species information
drosophila2_metadata$Species <- "drosophila2"

### Filter genes

# Remove genes with zero counts across all samples
drosophila2_counts <- counts[rowSums(counts) != 0, ]

dim(drosophila2_counts)

### Save processed data

saveRDS(
  drosophila2_counts,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/drosophila2_counts.rds"
)

saveRDS(
  drosophila2_metadata,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/drosophila2_metadata.rds"
)
```

#### triatoma

```{r}
## Prepare Triatoma count matrix

### Import featureCounts output

counts <- read.table(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/triatoma_counts.txt",
  row.names = 1,
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE
)

### Format count matrix

# Remove feature annotation columns
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)]

# Simplify sample names
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))
colnames(counts) <- gsub("triatoma_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))

head(counts)
dim(counts)

### Import sample metadata

metadata <- read.csv(
  file = "/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/triatoma_metadata.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  header = TRUE,
  sep = ","
)

head(metadata)
dim(metadata)

### Match metadata to count matrix

# Reorder metadata to match the count matrix
triatoma_metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop = FALSE]

# Verify that sample order is identical
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(triatoma_metadata))

# Add species information
triatoma_metadata$Species <- "triatoma"

### Filter genes

# Remove genes with zero counts across all samples
triatoma_counts <- counts[rowSums(counts) != 0, ]

dim(triatoma_counts)

### Save processed data

saveRDS(
  triatoma_counts,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/triatoma_counts.rds"
)

saveRDS(
  triatoma_metadata,
  file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/triatoma_metadata.rds"
)
```
